title: Dabur India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Dabur India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Dabur India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dabur India:
Dabur India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dabur India!
